appearance.theme_note: System theme follows your device preferences

profile.title: Profile
profile.click_to_change: Click on the avatar to change your photo

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.email_description: Choose which notifications to receive by email
notifications.comments_desc: When someone comments on your posts

security.title: Security
security.password_criteria_not_met: New password does not meet security criteria
security.password_same_as_old: New password must be different from the old one
security.two_factor_description: Add an extra layer of security
security.two_factor_enabled_desc: Protect your account with two-factor authentication
security.delete_account_warning: Once you delete your account, there is no going back. Please be certain.
security.password_managed_by_google: Your password is managed by Google. You don't have a password stored in our system.
security.change_password_google_instruction: To change your password, please visit your Google Account settings ({{email}}).
security.cannot_change_google_password: Google accounts use Google authentication. Password changes must be done through Google.
security.check_email_to_delete: We've sent a confirmation email to {{email}}. Please click the link to delete your account.
security.google_account_delete_info: As a Google account user, you'll receive a confirmation email to verify account deletion.
security.confirmation_email_will_be_sent: A confirmation email will be sent to {{email}} to verify this action.
security.email_managed_by_google: Your email address is managed by Google. You cannot change it here.
security.change_email_google_instruction: To change your email, please visit your Google Account settings ({{email}}).
security.change_email_description: Update your email address. A confirmation link will be sent to your current address.
security.new_email_required: Please enter a new email address
security.invalid_email: Please enter a valid email address
security.email_same_as_current: New email must be different from current email
security.check_your_email: Please check your current email inbox and click the confirmation link. The link expires in 1 hour.
security.email_change_info: A confirmation link will be sent to your current email address. You must click it to complete the change. The link expires in 1 hour.

sessions.title: Active Sessions
sessions.description: Manage your active sessions across all devices. Revoke any session you don't recognize.
sessions.revoke_all_confirm: This will sign you out from all other devices. Are you sure?
sessions.all_others_revoked: All other sessions have been signed out

common.unable_to_load: Unable to load your information. Please log in again.
